page.title: Category:Architecture by Municipality in Kōchi Prefecture

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{Template:Category:日本の都道府県/下位|高知県|[[市町村]]別に分類した[[建築物]]|建築物 (市町村別)|建築物|*}} Category:...」
[[Special:Diff/74082270#Category:指標別分類系カテゴリ群の改名および貼り替え|Bot作業依頼]]: [[:Category:高知県の市町村別]]改名に伴うリンク修正 - [[User:cewbot/log/20190913|log]]

revision.text:

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[Category:高知県の建築物 (市町村別)]] to [[Category:Architecture by Municipality in Kōchi Prefecture]]: Merge [[Category:高知県の建築物 (市町村別)]] into [[Category:Architecture by Municipality in Kōchi Prefecture]] via bot

[[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] (2025-05-16T00:15:06Z): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata) [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on . [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]][[sn:高知県の建築物 (市町村別)]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Buildings in Kochi, Kochi]] [[ja:Category:高知県の建築物 (市町村別)]] [[ko:Category:고치현의 시정촌별 건축물]] {{translated page|ja|Category:高知県の建築物 (市町村別)|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:日本の建築物 (市町村別)]] [[Category:高知県の市町村別]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Kōchi Prefecture]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]]

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Merge [[Category:日本の建築物 (市町村別)]] into [[Category:Architecture in Japan by Municipality]] via bot
Text replacement - "市町村別" to " by Municipality"
Merge [[Category:高知県の by Municipality]] into [[Category:Topics by Municipality in Kōchi Prefecture]] via bot
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - ": (Text replacement - "" to ""
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - ")links on [[:Category" to "links on " to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on ." to "[[Category:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on .]]"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on ." to "[[Category:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on .]]"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Text replacement - "[[Category:[[Category:" to "[[Category:"
Text replacement - "↵]]↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "[[建築物]]" to "[[Building]]s"
Text replacement - "[[市町村]]" to "{{ill|Municipalities in Japan|ja|市町村|ko|시정촌|zh|市町村}}"
Removing from [[Category:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on .]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "Category:日本の都道府県" to "Category:Prefectures of Japan"
Text replacement - "Z==↵" to "Zo== [[Category:Floating Z headings[["
Text replacement - "[[Category:Floating Z headings[[" to "[[Category:Floating Z headings]][["
Bot: remove non‑IW/non‑Category content

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
revision.text:
